divisions.title: Crossing the Jordan
divisions.summary: Joshua takes command; Israel crosses the Jordan on dry ground and camps at Gilgal.

divisions.title: Jericho & Ai
divisions.summary: Jericho collapses; Achan’s hidden sin brings defeat at Ai, then victory after honesty.

divisions.title: The Southern & Northern Campaigns
divisions.summary: The Gibeonite trick, the sun stands still, and the kings of the land fall.

divisions.title: Dividing the Land
divisions.summary: The land is allotted tribe by tribe; cities of refuge are set apart.

divisions.title: Choose This Day
divisions.summary: Joshua’s farewell: "as for me and my house, we will serve the LORD."
